prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/329-deck.key in Keynote (it uses the default 'White' theme). Change the theme to any other theme — 'Modern Portfolio' if available, otherwise pick any non-default option (Document inspector > Change Theme button). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote change_theme ~/Desktop/kinbench/329-deck.key "Modern Portfolio"'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/329-theme-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
